executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification blocked by external marketing outcome evidence. Architecture-owned gates are coherent and green.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification remains fail — sole whole-stack blocker
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact 7,428 min old (threshold 240 min, last updated June 2). Architecture-side cannot self-certify past this external evidence gap.
findings.root_cause: Codeberg-primary adoption measurement-pending. Marketing loop has not yet produced fresh outcome evidence that a marketing independent verifier would accept.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then marketing independent verification must rerun.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology matches the current runtime state
findings.mechanism: 20 jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 3 running, 2 transient gateway-restart errors. Topology coherent.
findings.root_cause: Architecture/runtime topology remains coherent while owner-loop work is in flight.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain live-topology inspection as source of truth each watchdog run.

findings.title: Architecture verifier/checker path is green on all architecture-owned gates
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_verifier.py returns ok (zero errors). agent_architecture_checker.py returns AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Independent verifier returns qualified_pass. Loop integrity green for both ralph-docs-watchdog and agent-architecture-watchdog. Docs verifier pass with incident closed.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue current verifier/checker/independent-verify stack as established architecture.

findings.title: Persisted disabled marketing-pulse legacy entry is history only
findings.mechanism: One disabled entry exists in persisted jobs (marketing-pulse legacy 85d5ff81). Live marketing-pulse (ad9540d0) is enabled and healthy. Zero live disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job replacement — normal.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification. Architecture-owned gates are coherent; this is the only blocker.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to independent verify script on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean and should remain the source of truth.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed audit against current live view: 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 3 running, 2 transient errors (gateway restart). Health monitor confirms architecture-owned blockers clear.
Independent verifier executed: qualified_pass=true. Architecture gates verified green; external marketing blocker correctly isolated.
Architecture verifier returned ok with zero architecture errors. Confirms architecture-owned path is coherent.
Architecture checker returned AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. No architecture-owned failures detected.

Reconfirmed code-backed marketing consumers still expose machine-verifiable shared market-intelligence consumption. market_intelligence_latest.json is 628 min old, marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json is 639 min old.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms architecture verifier returns ok, checker returns AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, loop integrity green, docs verifier pass with incident closed. External marketing blocker correctly isolated.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing independent verification artifact is 7,428 min old (fail)
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is measurement-pending.

notes: Architecture green means the architecture-owned verifier/checker/independent-verify path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.
Persisted disabled job (marketing-pulse legacy 85d5ff81) is history only; live marketing-pulse (ad9540d0) is enabled and healthy.
Health monitor confirms 20 live jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 external stale-artifact issue.
The remaining blocker is external marketing outcome evidence, not architecture runtime drift.
agent_architecture_verifier.py → ok (zero errors). agent_architecture_checker.py → AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. agent_architecture_independent_verify.py → qualified_pass=true.
Docs verifier: independently verified pass, incident closed, no pending stop required.
Two transient gateway-restart errors on competitor-analysis and content-poster — not architectural, will self-resolve on next schedule.
